notes: Game works native and on Proton out of the box. I installed manually D9VK , but actually there is just a black screen on launch.
title: Total War: MEDIEVAL II – Definitive Edition

notes: Running it through proton seems to increase the performance quite a bit. Load times are faster and I'm seeing a 60+ fps boost.
title: Total War: MEDIEVAL II – Definitive Edition

notes:
The game runs flawlessly out of the box with Proton. The performance is actually much better when compared to the native version (smooth 60fps on most battles).
The only issues I noticed were some loading screens having no image (black background) and a campaign map lag when moving around.
title: Total War: MEDIEVAL II – Definitive Edition
